name: Applesauce Cake #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and shortening until smooth.
2. Gradually add sugar to the butter mixture and beat well.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
4. Combine the flour, cocoa, salt, cinnamon, and cloves (scant amount) in a separate bowl.
5. Alternately add the dry ingredients and applesauce into the butter mixture, beating on low speed until just combined.
6. Dissolve baking soda in hot water, then stir it into the batter.
7. Stir in raisins, dates, or nuts.
8. Pour the batter into a greased 9x13 inch pan.
9. Bake at 350°F for about 40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Serve plain or with whipped cream.
